reviews.review_msg: Very good prof, keeps things simple and makes things easy to learn. Cheat sheets on all exams. Just double check answers on exams cuz they're usually out of a small number

take her for stats honestly! she's super chill and nice. goes over what the class did last lecture before proceeding to new material which is helpful for those who didn't attend lectures. Do the assignment questions bc that's basically what the exam questions are like, gives a cheat sheet (double sided), iclickers make attendance mandatory.
She tests fairly, gives good feedback, and is very approachable. I do regret not going to office hours more often.

Sonja is an amazing prof. Her lectures are very concise and she makes sure to explain each concept very thoroughly. This course was quite heavy and difficult, but as long as you do the hw you'll be fine. Quizzes are purely based off hw. For midterms and final, going through ALL respective hw IS essential.

sonja's a great prof ! she makes sure to solve algebraic problems step by step + explain concepts clearly. iclicker quizzes but not marked for attendance, it's just extra marks so don't miss them ! exams are straightforward, she tells u what to focus on + you're allowed a handwritten double-sided cheat sheet on the mdt and final :)
Great lecturer! very engaging. The exam questions reflected your effort on the homework. Make sure you do all the homework.
Sonja is a babe. She gives great concise lectures that are relevant to examinations. She is fun but not too goofy. Just do readings and possibly attend lectures. Mandatory lab quizzes.
She's a great professor who gave us bonus marks for midterm and final exam to bring the average up. Course requirements practice and there's lots of practice questions

Sonja is one of the greatest professors I have ever had. She explains things so clearly and gives a concise breakdown of how to approach and solve problems. Fair warning brush up on your calculus and it will be expect of you, and instructs you clearly on this, to go over some conceptual exercises and derivations on your own time.

Had very clear lecture slides and was fairly accessible outside of class via Canvas discussions. She was very transparent of the solutions that made it easy to follow. It was my second time getting around this class and she made it much easier to understand. I didnt like how the midterms were only out of 17 so each mark would drop your percentage

Sonja is an amazing prof. she teaches the material so clearly and she knows the areas where students can find difficult. She is very accessible outside of class. Her tests were fair and she made the content easier than it was. I highly suggest taking this class with her if you want a gpa booster.

Sonja explains concepts thoroughly and her lectures are easy to follow. She also records all lectures and posts annotated slides which is useful for review. Review lecture notes, assignments, labs, and read chapters that are more complex, and you'll really enjoy this course! Truly everything you could ask for in a prof

Sonja is superb. By far one of the best professors I've encountered in all my post-secondary experience. For reference, I am NOT a "math person" yet, received an A-. Yes, it's fairly easy so long as you just keep up & attend labs (heavily referenced on exams). Well-paced & very clear, Sonja personally takes a lot of care to encourage your success.

Everything you want in a professor! She records lectures, posts annotated slides, and tells you the topics that will be on the exam. Her lectures follow closely with the textbook. You get a cheatsheet for all the exams, I got 100% on both midterms so far! You also learn A LOT in this class and the material is super interesting.

Great prof! Highly recommend if you're a bus student and wanna get a science cred + learn some basics before bus 232. Exams are super easy - you get a cheat sheet. I literally just study the night before by listening to her lectures in 2x speed and writing up a cheat sheet. Literally highschool stats with the first exam being mean median and mode.

Sonja is an amazing prof -- she's super caring for her students, explains concepts thoroughly, lectures are easy to follow. Tests are relatively easy, based on materials pulled directly from lectures and labs. Attend all lectures and labs, review lecture notes, and read chapters that are more complex, and you'll breeze through this course!

STAT100 was one of the easiest classes I've ever taken. There were bi-weekly assignments which were like 2-5 questions, and they were based directly on the lectures (i.e., the questions were ones Sonja went over in lecture or ones covered in the labs by the TAs). The exams were also so fair. You get a cheat sheet (1 page) and there's no surprises.

One of the best profs I ever had. She is very knowledgeable and cares about her students. Her lectures and lecture slides are very clear and easy to understand. Some assignments + 2 midterms + 1 final, Exams were reasonable but you definitely need to study for them and keep up with the course material. Getting an A in this class is not difficult.
Amazing if you are taking stats 270 take it with her

One of the best profs I've ever had. Midterms and final exams had no surprises and we were only tested on things that were taught. I struggled in stat 203 but 305 was by far way easier and Sonja did an excellent job at making sure her lessons were simplified and easy to understand.
Overall it was awesome. You can study just a week to pass the course.

Sonja is a great professor, she is very supportive and ready to accommodate students. The material is fairly easy and doesn't require too much review. I only have one complaint, the midterms were out of 13 or 15 marks, and one mistake can make the difference between an A and a B.

Sonja is an amazing professor. Exams was around the same difficulty as the examples in the lectures. As long as you understand those, you are golden. This class can be difficult, but Sonja made the course material easily understandable.

sonja is the best prof ive had in my entire undergrad. she is so thoughtful and an amazing lecturer. she only tests you on things she has taught in class, there is no surprises. to better prep for exams, do the assignments and quizzes again and you will be set because they are so similar.

Wonderful professor. Haven't had a professor I was this pleased to be a student. Carefully review the quizzes, and prepare the cheat sheet and you will be spot on. She provides the lecture code with lots of detail so that assignments are very easy and she is very accessible for extra help. Thanks Sonja! :)
Best prof in the whole dang stats department.
Gem

Sonja is the best prof in stat. If you have the chance to take any of her classes please do! She explains the concept very well and makes difficult concepts easier for students. She is very friendly and caring. Whenever you have questions, she is always there for you! Always replies messages rapidly. I took both stat 201 and 305 with her. Amazing!
Take this class with Sonja Isberg. In fact, take any statistics course you can with Sonja Isberg. STAT305 was actually so much fun for me personally because of the amazing professor teaching it.
A truly amazing prof!

Best teacher ever - very clear and concise, always available during breaks/after class for questions
Assignments translate well into midterms and exams, if you can complete assignments individually then you should be set for exams.

Sonja is by far the best professor i have ever had. She is very nice and professional. Her lectures are extremely clear, her exams are very fair and overall the course is  easy if you practice and make sure you understand the concepts. Everything you need to know for the exams are covered In lectures & assignments. Textbook questions are helpful

Prof Isberg is the definition of a good teacher. she genuinely gives a shit about both her students and the material she teaches them. take her class, any that she's teaching and you will do yourself a favour!
Best prof ever!

A great prof who cares about her students and the ways she delivered lecture materials were clear. 60% is a C- in her class. Iclicker questions every Monday and her exam was heavy. Do tons of practice and make sure you understand the concepts. No scaling in her class. A cheat sheet was allowed on the exam but still do a lot of practice to prepare.
Sonja is great at explaining entry-level concepts for statistics. She was an extremely fair and understanding prof, who tries to innovate her teaching style based on feedback.

Don't know what else to say other than a great professor. The class ended up being a breeze as lectures and homework assignments were clear, concise, and helpful. The two midterms and the final were all extremely fair and there were no "tricks" involved. As long as you pay attention in lectures and ask questions when needed you'll be fine!

Sonja is the ideal prof. This course is not easy by any means, as a lot is covered and the ideas build; getting more and more complex. That being said, Sonja introduced each topic + concept with so much clarity and made lectures very engaging. She is so calm and collected; I am going to miss her short laughs between slides. Exams are fair as well!
She a good prof

Makes every new concept easy to understand, and goes through them very throughly. Weekly homework is not difficult, with weekly iClicker quizzes in person. Exams were spot on with what we learned in class, no surprises. Honestly there is nothing else you could want in a professor. Sonja is amazing, would recommend her for any statistics class.

this is for stat 201, this prof is goated. she is so amazing and teaches w ease. super mellow-toned which makes it nice to listen to LMAO. tests you on what she has taught there are no surprises and she truly wants her students to succeed. take any class w her I don't think you'll be disappointed.
Oops my last post was actually for STATS201!! Not stats305. TAKE STATS 201 WITH HER SHES THE BESTTT

Best teacher EVER. She teaches so clearly anyone, even my little cousins could understand her lectures. On our midterm we got to bring in a cheat sheet. She teaches sooooo well and makes the class very easy but you are still learning and understanding the material clearly. Take this as an elective/course with her if you can she is amazing.

I was extremely nervous going into this class, as Statistics is not my strongest suit. However, Sonja did an amazing job explaining difficult concepts and she did an amazing job providing examples that were easy to remember and relate to statistical topics. She is very caring and her assignments and exams are extremely fair.

Sonja is one of the best professors I have ever had, so sweet. Her lectures are easy to follow and listen to. She explains difficult concepts so well and makes statistics fun. Would definitely recommend her!

Sonja is the best professor I've ever had, period. She has the perfect mix of straightforward explanation and sassy humor in her lectures that makes you pay attention to what's going on. The online assignments are a piece of cake, because she covers all the necessary R code in the in-class modules. The exams are easy, and she's a sweetheart.

Sonja is the BEST prof I've had so far. Stats can be really confusing but she explains concepts really well, and gives plenty of examples. The lectures are easy to follow and the assignments and quizzes were really useful in learning, I'd highly recommend taking stats with Sonja if you have the option :)

I HIGHLY recommend taking stats with her! As someone who is not strong with stats, I find Sonja to be very lenient and clear when teaching important concepts, making sure students understand. Her Canvas course is easy to navigate and provides a lot of resources (recordings, annotated slides, specific textbook chapters, etc). Overall a great prof!

Her explanations are clear and lectures are enjoyable. Midterm and Final questions were similar to the weekly assignments, which were straightforward and easy. Highly recommend it as an elective (Q/SS)! :))

Sonja is such an amazing lecturer. She's so organized, great at explaining concepts, and clear about her expectations. Exams and assignments are very fair and she goes out of her way to make sure students are prepared. Also very accessible outside of class time. Overall just really amazing, definitely recommend!

Sonja is the BEST stats prof I have ever had! She's amazing at explaining concepts and repeats herself if she has to to make sure everyone understands. Very clear on what will be on tests/expectations. As someone who doesnt like stats, she is very fun to listen to!
So clear, organized, patient!
What a caring prof! Love her!
Really good prof! Slides were clear, and her lecturing was great. Would recommend

Professor Isberg is absolutely amazing. Most organized prof I've ever had. The material was already pretty easy, but she was so good at explaining it that it made the class even easier. This allowed me to get the first A+ of my university career! Overall, just an excellent experience and I'd definitely recommend her to everyone.

Professor Isberg is quite possibly the best professor I have had at SFU, and I am not even a stats major. I took this class as a Q credit without much thought, but it turned into one of my favourite courses this term. The lectures are well organized and helpful, and the professor leaves lots of time for questions. The exams are quite fair too.
best prof I've ever had. would highly recommend. she s super organized and cares about her students.
Great prof and person.

One of the best professors. Sonja is really caring and is exceptional at explaining concepts. Her exams are very fair provided you did the homework and quizzes and attended lectures. If you have the chance to take a course with her, do it!

A great prof and you can tell that she is passionate about what she teaches. Pretty much just goes over what was said in the textbook in lectures, but will answer any questions and gives clarification if needed.

Sonja really cares about her students and her lectures are very informative and clearly laid out. Takes the time to go over any questions a student may have during lecture and gives very detailed explanations to make sure no one is left behind. Would definitely recommend taking a class with her she is great at teaching!
Most organized prof ever. She is very caring and the course content was very easy. I would definitely recommend to take a class with her if you have the opportunity to do so.
Really good at explaining contents. Most organized prof I have ever seen. Easy course, but need to get 90% to get A.

She really cares about students' experiences and her class materials are very organized. Her lectures try to simplify concepts, but could occasionally get a little text heavy or equation heavy. Easy, relevant homework and exams are reasonably challenging most of the time. Very approachable outside of class.
